title: Colorly
description: Real-time display color grading — tune Hue, Saturation, Brightness & Contrast for the whole game.
body:
# Colorly

**Colorly** gives you a clean, real-time color-grading panel for Minecraft — adjust the look of the entire game on the fly, the same way you would in a video editor.

Tweak **Hue**, **Saturation**, **Brightness** and **Contrast** and watch the whole screen update instantly. Warm up your world, cool it down, crank the saturation for a vivid look, or pull it back for a cinematic, washed-out feel — it's all up to you.

## ✨ Features

- 🎨 **Four live sliders** — Hue, Saturation, Brightness, Contrast
- ⚡ **Instant preview** — every change is applied to the screen in real time
- 🖥️ **Whole-game grading** — affects the world, not just one element
- 🪶 **Lightweight & client-side** — a single full-screen shader pass, no performance baggage
- 🔄 **One-click reset** — back to neutral whenever you want
- 💾 **Saved automatically** — your look is remembered between sessions

## 🎛️ How to use

Open the settings panel through **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)**, or bind a key in **Options → Controls → Colormatic**. Drag the sliders, enjoy the live preview, and hit **Reset Settings** to start over.

## 📦 Requirements

- **Fabric Loader** + **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**
- **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** *(optional, recommended — adds a config button)*

Client-side only — safe to use on any server.

---

*Made with ♥ by **x1eqn**.*
